Reimbursement at 80% UCR outside network within UAE
Reimbursement at 100% actual costs or 100% UCR (whichever less) outside UAE

AED 60,000 per person per year with 20% copay
Pregnancy must be declared in MAF

Worldwide coverage individual health plan with AED 1 million annual limit on NEXTCARE RN2 network, featuring private inpatient rooms and 20% outpatient copay capped at AED 50. Pre-existing conditions covered up to AED 150,000 per member per year subject to declaration and medical underwriting. Maternity benefits up to AED 10,000 with 10% coinsurance, dental covered up to AED 3,500 with 20% copay, and dialysis covered up to AED 60,000 per year with 20% copay. Direct billing within network, reimbursement at 80% UCR outside network within UAE, and full reimbursement (subject to UCR) for treatment outside UAE up to 90 days per trip.
[3] Mid-range plan with capped pre-existing limit of AED 150,000 and moderate maternity/dental sub-limits

The plan offers worldwide coverage with a respectable AED 1 million aggregate limit and comprehensive benefits including organ transplant (AED 100,000 sub-limit), but the pre-existing condition cap of AED 150,000 and mandatory medical underwriting requirement position it as a mid-tier product. Maternity and dental sub-limits are moderate (AED 10,000 and AED 3,500 respectively), while the 20% outpatient copay structure with AED 50 cap provides reasonable cost-sharing. The 0% copay on prescribed drugs is a positive feature, but overall the coverage parameters and sub-limits align with a middle-market positioning rather than premium comprehensive coverage.

content: RAK Family Care Plan - Super Restricted

children.content: The RAK Family Care Plan - Super Restricted offers worldwide coverage with a AED 1,000,000 annual aggregate limit on the NAS Super Restricted network. The plan provides private room hospitalization and includes a AED 150,000 sub-limit for declared pre-existing conditions. Maternity coverage is capped at AED 10,000 with a 10% co-payment on all maternity treatments.
Reimbursement 100% of actual cost up to UAE network rates (in-network)
Reimbursement 80% of actual cost up to 80% UAE network rates (out-of-network)
AED 10,000 for medically necessary caesarean section
AED 1,600 per member per year (reimbursement only)
Covers Osteopathy, Chiropractic, Herbal Treatments, Alternative Medication, Ayurveda, Acupuncture, Homeopathy
Covered only in cases of medical emergencies
Covered with declaration and medical underwriting
AED 12,761.50 (for 2 adults only as per member details)

This plan provides worldwide coverage with a AED 1,000,000 annual limit on a Super Restricted network basis. Pre-existing conditions are covered up to AED 150,000 if declared and underwritten. Maternity benefits include AED 10,000 for normal delivery and caesarean with 10% member co-payment. Dental coverage is capped at AED 3,500 with 20% co-pay, and dialysis is limited to AED 60,000. Outpatient consultations carry a 20% co-pay with AED 50 maximum per visit.

[3] Mid-range coverage with worldwide scope and private room standard, but restricted by Super Restricted network and moderate sub-limits for maternity (AED 10,000), dental (AED 3,500), and dialysis (AED 60,000).

The plan offers a high annual aggregate limit (AED 1,000,000) and worldwide coverage, which are strong features. However, the Super Restricted network significantly limits provider choice, and key benefits have relatively low sub-limits: maternity is capped at AED 10,000 per event, dental at AED 3,500 annually, and dialysis at AED 60,000. Pre-existing conditions are covered but only up to AED 150,000 and require declaration and underwriting. The 20% outpatient co-pay (max AED 50) and 10% maternity co-pay add member cost-sharing. Overall, this is a mid-tier plan suitable for families seeking basic comprehensive coverage but willing to accept network restrictions and moderate sub-limits.

content: Takaful Emarat Plan 4 Opal-DXB 20%

children.content: A Takaful-compliant medical plan with worldwide coverage and AED 1 million aggregate annual limit. Features NAS-SRN network access with private room accommodation and 20% coinsurance structure. Covers pre-existing conditions up to AED 150,000 subject to medical underwriting.
20% up to AED 25 for General Practitioners
Direct billing within network at 80% of usual & customary rates
Reimbursement 100% outside network where NAS not present
Reimbursement 80% outside network where NAS present
AED 12,500 for normal delivery and medically necessary C-Section
AED 200 single vision lenses once per year
AED 250 bifocal/trifocal lenses once per year
Covered subject to medical underwriting via MAF
No waiting period for declared pre-existing conditions
Pregnancy must be declared in MAF

Takaful-compliant health insurance with worldwide territorial scope and AED 1 million aggregate annual coverage. NAS-SRN network with private room inpatient accommodation and 20% coinsurance structure across most services. Pre-existing conditions covered up to AED 150,000 per year subject to declaration and medical underwriting with no waiting period. Maternity covered up to AED 12,500 with 10% coinsurance, dental AED 1,500 with 20% copay, optical AED 1,000 with detailed sub-limits, and dialysis AED 60,000 with 20% copay per visit. Direct billing within network settled at 80% of usual and customary rates; outside network reimbursement varies by NAS presence (100% where absent, 80% where present).
[3] Mid-range plan with capped pre-existing limit (AED 150,000) and moderate ancillary benefits (dental AED 1,500, optical AED 1,000).

The plan offers worldwide coverage and reasonable aggregate limit but applies 20% coinsurance broadly, caps pre-existing conditions at AED 150,000 (below aggregate limit), and provides moderate dental/optical/alternative medicine sub-limits typical of mid-tier plans. Maternity coverage requires declaration and medical underwriting with potential premium adjustment for undeclared pregnancies.
